summary: The reception and open-plan kitchen is in excellent decorative and structural condition overall, presenting modern and high-specification fittings throughout. The cleanliness of the room, including the kitchen cabinetry, integrated appliances, and utility area, is maintained to a very high professional standard. Minor localized blemish wear is noted on the soft furnishings, some wall corners, and the window glazing exterior.

items.name: Ceiling
items.description: Plastered and emulsioned flat white ceiling with recessed LED spotlights, white integrated air extraction vent grilles, and circular smoke detector alarms.

items.name: Walls
items.description: Neutral cream emulsioned plaster walls.
defects: scuff mark mid level right hand side to wall external corner adjacent to door frame
scuff marks mid level to splashback area behind kettle counter run

items.name: Woodwork & Skirting
items.description: White painted MDF skirting boards and matching door architraves.
defects: minor scuff marks low level to external corner near floor transition

items.name: Flooring
items.description: Light oak-effect engineered wood laminate floorboards.
defects: superficial dark scratch mark approximately 10cm near the metal frame leg of the armchair

items.name: Window
items.description: Double-glazed window with white metal interior frame, silver lockable handle, and black rubber window seal.
defects: light external water spots to glazing
small black bug debris inside window frame ledge

items.name: Patio Door
items.description: Double-glazed balcony patio door with white frame and brushed chrome locking handle containing two keys.

items.name: Roller Blinds
items.description: Plain white fabric roller blinds with plastic beaded pull chains.

items.name: Tufted Gray Velvet Sofa
items.description: Gray velvet three-seat sofa with tufted bench seat cushion, fabric-covered block arms, and cylindrical bolster pillows.
defects: typical minor pile shading and light compression marks to velvet fabric on seat and bolster cushions

items.name: Velvet Armchair
items.description: Pale blue/gray velvet armchair supported on thin brass/gold painted metal wire legs.
defects: small white paint speck or spot blemish on the upper-mid right hand side of the backrest

items.name: Nesting Coffee Tables
items.description: Set of two circular nesting coffee tables with white marble-effect laminated tops on black painted round metal frame bases.
defects: superficial circular water rings and faint surface marks on the table top laminate surfaces

items.name: Plush Geometric Rug
items.description: Soft shag-pile geometric rug with gray, cream, and black marble-pattern abstract lines.

items.name: Dining Table
items.description: Round white faux-marble top dining table with single central black pedestal metal base.

items.name: Velvet Dining Chairs
items.description: Molded dining chairs upholstered in gray velvet, set on tapered black metal legs.
defects: prominent pile wear, scuffs, and indentation shadows on velvet fabric seats

items.name: Framed Canvas Art
items.description: Large black wooden frame enclosing a white, black, and gold abstract lotus blossom canvas print.

items.name: Floor Leaner Mirror
items.description: Large rectangular glass floor leaner mirror framed in thin black metal.

items.name: Island Pendant Lights
items.description: Three single drop pendant lights suspended from a black ceiling track, featuring golden brass bulb holder sockets and warm-glow glass filament tear-drop bulbs.

items.name: Sideboard Console Cabinet
items.description: White marble-effect wooden console unit featuring two left cabinet doors, two right drawers, thin gold-accent handles, and gold wire frame legs.
defects: minor dark speck mark/scratch about 5mm long on the left cupboard door facade

items.name: Kitchen Worktops
items.description: Thick solid white composite stone worktops on kitchen island and rear run with splashbacks.

items.name: Kitchen Island Under-Counter Basin
items.description: Stainless steel square single-basin sink mounted under-counter with integrated basket strainer plug.
defects: typical fine cleaning hairline scratches to bottom surface

items.name: Gunmetal Kitchen Mixer Tap
items.description: High arch gunmetal gray chrome goose-neck monobloc kitchen mixer tap with single control lever.
defects: slight water spotting around the base seam

items.name: Kitchen Cabinetry
items.description: Handless flat-panel kitchen island and floor cabinets in glossy taupe/gray with matching tall integrated fridge housings.

items.name: Integrated Miele Induction Hob
items.description: Built-in black glass Miele 4-zone induction hob with touch controls.

items.name: Miele Built-in Extractor Hood
items.description: Stainless steel under-cabinet extractor hood with mesh grease filters and dial control switch.

items.name: Integrated Miele Oven
items.description: Built-in stainless steel and black glass Miele oven, model H2860B, with wire shelving and drip tray inside.

items.name: Integrated Miele Microwave Oven
items.description: Built-in Miele microwave oven, model M7244, with glass turntable tray.

items.name: Integrated Miele Dishwasher
items.description: Fully integrated built-in Miele dishwasher, model G 5050 SCVi, complete with interior baskets and spray arms.

items.name: Integrated Miele Fridge/Freezer
items.description: Built-in double tall cupboard integrated Miele fridge and freezer unit with dynamic cooling and glass storage shelves.

items.name: Electric Kettle
items.description: Traditional black and polished chrome electric kettle.

items.name: Bamboo Chopping Board
items.description: Thick rectangular block-end bamboo wooden food chopping board.

items.name: Power Sockets and Switches
items.description: Double wall power sockets and light switches with a glossy black nickel chrome finish plate.

items.name: Utility Cupboard Double Doors
items.description: Double solid-core white painted swing doors with brushed chrome latches and handles.
defects: minor chip and finish wear to wood frame adjacent to striker latch

items.name: Integrated Miele Washer-Dryer
items.description: Front-loading white Miele wash-and-dry laundry machine with stainless steel honeycomb drum.

items.name: Nuaire MRXBOX MVHR System
items.description: Wall-mounted white metal mechanical ventilation heat recovery ventilator box.

items.name: Danfoss Heat Interface Unit
items.description: Danfoss wall-mounted heating unit hub with interface diagnostic screen.

items.name: Handheld Stick Vacuum Cleaner
items.description: Blue and silver corded hand stick vacuum cleaner on floor of utility cabinet.

items.name: Handheld Clothes Steamer
items.description: White and black upright handheld laundry garment steamer.

items.name: Snoopy Table Lamp
items.description: Green round pedestal table lamp with a ceramic Snoopy figure holding up the bulb.

items.name: Fire Strategy Notice
items.description: A4 aluminum framed fire emergency procedure notice plaque screwed to entrance wall.
